idea-plugin.name: PHP String Field
idea-plugin.description:
PHP String Field is a PhpStorm plugin that adds navigation and reference support for string parameters, Including nested fields accessed via dot notation ('user.profile.email').

Features

Navigation, reference, and find usages support.

Usage

  • Add the @string-field to a @param phpdoc tag, to enable navigation through string paths.

  • Use the @string-field:call to interpret the last field to be treated as a callable method if it exists in the referenced path.

Now you can navigate from 'profile.avatar.url' directly to the corresponding property in the class.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
[1.0.0] - 2025-11-04

Added
- Navigation, reference, and find usages support.
